title: Extended Crafting
description: More Crafting recipes for items which can and can't be obtained in the normal game.
body:
**This mod massively expands the standard crafting table by introducing essential new recipes for items that can and can't be obtained in the normal game. Recipes only become visible in the crafting book once a key ingredient or the item itself has been obtained at least once.**

![Gunpowder Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3146fb3632253cd2e498f10d7e89c50655508e3.png)

## 📜 Currently Added Craftable Items:
- Gunpowder
- Trident
- Totem of Undying
- Name Tag
- Saddle
- Slime Ball
- Tall Grass
- Sand
- Sandstone
- String
